review_text: The visuals are stunning and the world feels alive, even when the story takes familiar turns.
This movie balances humor and drama very well, with several scenes that stayed with me.
The film is not perfect, but it has heart, energy, and a cast that clearly understands the material.
A touching and thoughtful movie that rewards patience with a powerful emotional payoff.
The director turns a familiar premise into something fresh through careful details and strong atmosphere.
